text.title: Swap & Memory Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Swap & Memory Management end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: size-swap
step.action: Compute swap_gb = min(2×RAM, 16); ensure free disk ≥ swap_gb × 1.2.

step.name: create-swap
step.action: Run swap-create.sh; mkswap; swapon; persist via /etc/fstab.

step.name: wire-cgroup-limits
step.action: Drop-in MemoryHigh/Max for every heavy unit.
step.decision-gate: If any heavy unit lacks MemoryMax, refuse to publish the plan.
